data.title: Modify fix-bug/SKILL.md — add single-agent-integrate.md integration path and ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT guard
data.description: Modify plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md. Changes: (1) Step 6: pass ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) in dispatch prompt; after sub-agent returns, add: When worktree.isolation_enabled=true: verify $WORKTREE_PATH != $ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT guard, then follow plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/single-agent-integrate.md. (2) Step 7: add explicit conditional — when worktree.isolation_enabled=true, gates handled by single-agent-integrate.md; add explicit prose 'When isolation_enabled=false: existing Step 7 behavior applies unchanged' (satisfies grep -c 'isolation_enabled=false.*existing' > 0). AC: test-fix-bug-worktree-integration.sh all 3 GREEN; test-fix-bug-orchestrator-root.sh GREEN. testing_mode: UPDATE
